incident_pattern: A deployment automation proposes pushing a production configuration change with partial rollback coverage.
traditional_policy_rationale: The actor has deployment permission and the workflow has environment approval.

action.description: AI deployment agent proposes a production configuration change with partial rollback coverage.

context.known_failure_mode: bad configuration can cause customer-visible outage before rollback completes

incident_pattern: An agent proposes a documentation-only change with strong revertability.
traditional_policy_rationale: Low-risk repository change with normal branch protection.

action.description: AI coding agent proposes a documentation-only README change.

incident_pattern: An agent proposes disabling a flaky security check to unblock release.
traditional_policy_rationale: The workflow maintainer has permission to edit CI configuration.

action.description: AI release agent proposes disabling a dependency security scan to unblock deployment.

context.known_failure_mode: removing detection can allow vulnerable artifacts through

incident_pattern: An automation proposes deleting unused object storage buckets after a cost scan.
traditional_policy_rationale: The service account has storage administration permission.

action.description: Cloud automation proposes deleting object storage buckets identified as unused.

context.known_failure_mode: deleted objects may require backup restore and may not be fully recoverable

incident_pattern: An automation proposes scaling a stateless service during demand spike.
traditional_policy_rationale: Autoscaling and platform permissions allow replica changes.

action.description: Platform agent proposes scaling a stateless service from 10 to 16 replicas.

context.known_failure_mode: excess capacity cost or brief load-balancing instability

incident_pattern: An agent proposes changing firewall rules broadly to restore integration traffic.
traditional_policy_rationale: The administrator role can modify network policy.

action.description: Cloud agent proposes broad firewall ingress changes to restore partner integration traffic.

context.known_failure_mode: overbroad ingress can create exposure before review catches it

incident_pattern: A security automation proposes quarantining many endpoints after a noisy detection.
traditional_policy_rationale: The endpoint response tool permits containment actions.

action.description: Security automation proposes quarantining 140 endpoints after a noisy malware detection.

context.known_failure_mode: false-positive containment can disrupt business operations

incident_pattern: A security agent proposes rotating a single low-privilege token after confirmed exposure.
traditional_policy_rationale: The token owner and security automation are authorized.

action.description: Security agent proposes rotating one low-privilege token after confirmed exposure.

context.known_failure_mode: dependent job may need token refresh

incident_pattern: An agent proposes transferring funds to a new vendor after incomplete evidence matching.
traditional_policy_rationale: The payment amount is below a configured approval threshold.

action.description: Finance agent proposes sending a payment to a new vendor with incomplete evidence matching.

context.known_failure_mode: funds transfer may be difficult or impossible to reverse

incident_pattern: An agent proposes issuing a small customer refund with strong transaction evidence.
traditional_policy_rationale: The refund is within support policy and below manual review threshold.

action.description: Customer support agent proposes issuing a small refund with strong transaction evidence.

incident_pattern: A support agent proposes emailing a large customer segment with an unreviewed template.
traditional_policy_rationale: The campaign tool allows the support operations role to send customer notices.

action.description: Support agent proposes sending an unreviewed email template to 40,000 customers.

context.known_failure_mode: email cannot be unsent and may create customer confusion or disclosure

incident_pattern: A support agent drafts a reply but does not send it without review.
traditional_policy_rationale: Draft creation does not contact the customer.

action.description: Support agent drafts a customer reply for human review without sending it.

context.known_failure_mode: incorrect draft is caught before customer contact

incident_pattern: An IT automation proposes bulk deprovisioning accounts based on stale HR synchronization.
traditional_policy_rationale: The identity automation has deprovisioning permission.

action.description: IT agent proposes bulk deprovisioning 280 accounts after stale HR synchronization.

context.known_failure_mode: incorrect deprovisioning can lock out active employees

incident_pattern: An IT agent clears a local temporary cache on a single development machine.
traditional_policy_rationale: The task is local and reversible through normal development setup.

action.description: IT agent clears temporary build cache on one developer workstation.
